title: Nerdgasm
wikitext:
[]: Nerdgasm             Quote Post by scarmullet » Mon Jul 06, 2009 9:21 pm Evangelion Coffee Have you heard of this, Evangelion themed coffee cans for Evangelion 2.0? "Evangelion Brand Cofee, Coffee so good, you'll go insane. *Shinji screams*"[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Jul 06, 2009 9:48 pm I hated to do this since ^that emoticon has been getting more use IMO than it deserves recently, but I think I should state that there are other threads this has been mentioned however, I don't recall in any of those threads a link for purchasing that doesn't require translator software for non-Japanese readers, so you may have yet found something useful

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jul 06, 2009 9:49 pm Not to mention UCC Coffee has had Evangelion characters featured on it since years before 2I.

[]:             Quote Post by catinajar » Tue Jul 07, 2009 7:46 am I love the fact that you search for Evangelion on their engine and you get Gurren Lagaan.... Also, there is some sick nonsense on that website. I don't want to see a porn star dressed up as Rei being violated. Thankyou. But bravo for the UCC coffee link, I only have two cans at the moment, I would like the set!

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Jul 07, 2009 1:32 pm $20 for a pack of six? For that much, I could almost go to Starbucks!

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Sat Jul 11, 2009 3:59 pm seriously, i think of buying those. or atleast the Asuka one

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Jul 11, 2009 4:27 pm I want LCL Drinks but if they have some Coffee ones at Otakon then I'll pick them up for photos.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 11, 2009 9:44 pm Meh. Nothing new.

[]:             Quote Post by Fredrick2003 » Wed Jul 29, 2009 9:00 pm I wonder how much money anno makes from this, if any.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:39 am Fredrick2003 wrote: I wonder how much money anno makes from this, if any.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:41 am Or, they don't make any money from it directly, as UCC is a sponsor, so they make the money. In return, they helped fund the movies.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Tue Aug 04, 2009 9:42 am ^yep, that's a possibility to, but fact is, Anno doesn't get any money from coffee btw, i still didn't bought the cans, does anyone knows if the site is thrustworthy? don't realy feel like spreading mah credit card over dah whole interwebz
